content.thinking:
The user wants to create a new local WordPress site called 'eval-test-onboard'. Let me think about what skill might apply here.

Looking at the available skills, I see `nexus-sites` which says "Discover and show all local and WP Engine sites with status. Groups running vs halted, shows WPE links, and surfaces next actions. Use at the start of any workflow involving sites — always call this first before acting on a site."

But the user wants to CREATE a new site, not just discover existing ones. The nexus CLI would be used to create sites. Let me think about the right command...

Actually, the constraints say the skill instructions are already in my system prompt - "use them directly, do NOT invoke the Skill tool". But I don't see nexus-sites skill content in my system prompt - I only see the nexus-wpe skill content.


I need to check what nexus commands are available for site creation. Looking at the nexus CLI path, I should be able to use it directly to create the WordPress site locally. I'm realizing the constraint says not to invoke the Skill tool, but the nexus-sites skill details aren't in my system prompt anyway. Let me just try running the nexus CLI directly to see what site management commands are available.

content.text: I'll check what site creation commands are available in the nexus CLI first.

content.content:
Usage: nexus sites [options] [command]

Manage Local and WPE sites

Options:
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  get [options] <target>            Get detailed information about a site
  clone <source> <newName>          Clone an existing site
  rename <target> <newName>         Rename a site
  export <target> [outputPath]      Export a site to archive
  import [options] <archivePath>    Import a site from archive
  logs [options] <target>           View site logs
  list [options]                    List all sites (local + WPE)
  create [options] <target>         Create a new local site
  start <target>                    Start a local site
  stop <target>                     Stop a local site
  restart <target>                  Restart a local site
  delete [options] <target>         Delete a local site
  config-php <target> <version>     Change PHP version
  config-ssl <target>               Trust SSL certificate
  config-xdebug [options] <target>  Toggle Xdebug
  status [options] <target>         Show what cached data exists for a site and
                                    how fresh it is
  refresh [options] <target>        Refresh the cached data (digital twin) for
                                    a site
  help [command]                    display help for command

tool_use_result.stdout:
Usage: nexus sites [options] [command]

Manage Local and WPE sites

Options:
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  get [options] <target>            Get detailed information about a site
  clone <source> <newName>          Clone an existing site
  rename <target> <newName>         Rename a site
  export <target> [outputPath]      Export a site to archive
  import [options] <archivePath>    Import a site from archive
  logs [options] <target>           View site logs
  list [options]                    List all sites (local + WPE)
  create [options] <target>         Create a new local site
  start <target>                    Start a local site
  stop <target>                     Stop a local site
  restart <target>                  Restart a local site
  delete [options] <target>         Delete a local site
  config-php <target> <version>     Change PHP version
  config-ssl <target>               Trust SSL certificate
  config-xdebug [options] <target>  Toggle Xdebug
  status [options] <target>         Show what cached data exists for a site and
                                    how fresh it is
  refresh [options] <target>        Refresh the cached data (digital twin) for
                                    a site
  help [command]                    display help for command

content.content:
Usage: nexus sites create [options] <target>

Create a new local site

Options:
  --blueprint <name>  Create from Local blueprint
  --php <version>     PHP version (e.g., 8.2, 8.1, 7.4)
  --wp <version>      WordPress version (e.g., 6.4, 6.3)
  -h, --help          display help for command
